roa.docketEntryComment: PEOPLE'S NON-OPPO TO THE 1473,7 MTN FILED
DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOTION VACATE CONVICTION FILED

/CAL: MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA, ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF NOVEMBER9, 2011/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:11-09-11/X: SENTENCE DATE: 11-09-11/ /X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA,/CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WAS ILLEGAL ANDINVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THE GUILTYPLEA ENTERED ON 06-10-1998 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED, THESENTENCE ENTERED ON 07-08-1998 ARE HEREBY VACATED,/X: THERE BEING NO NEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385:INTEREST OFJUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/
